title: When all subitems of an item have the STATUS of, but only IF
excerpt: I use the automation “When all subitems of an item have the STATUS of SOMETHING, change the item’s STATUS to SOMETHING”.  But I need to do it with adding in “and only if DATE has not passed”.

posts.author: aspurlock (Amy Spurlock)
posts.cookedHtml: I use the automation “When all subitems of an item have the STATUS of SOMETHING, change the item’s STATUS to SOMETHING”. But I need to do it with adding in “and only if DATE has not passed”.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @aspurlock ,

Unfortunately monday’s “premade” automations do not currently support added customization ( to add the condition of “and only if DATE has not passed”) , and similarly you cannot create a custom automation with conditions regarding the date .

image937×593 32.2 KB

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
